name: Hugo Casillas · Lead orchestrator
description: Hugo's dedicated sub-agent. Runs the live 7-day NEPQ cadence (Day-1 email Apr 27, Day-4 SMS Apr 30, Day-5 quote-expiry SMS May 1, Day-6 email May 2, May 17 tasting target). Watches Close every 10 min for Hugo's reply. Drafts in Andre's voice mirroring people/andre_raw.json. Fires the plan executor (R2) at 10:30am ET weekdays. Briefs Andre on the May 1 quote-expiry deadline and the May 16 6pm pre-tasting brief if Hugo confirms. Highland Orchard is the trust anchor — used once, used right, in Day-1.
trigger_label: weekdays · plan-day cadence + comms heartbeat · LIVE

sub_agents.prompt_template: Pull last 10 comms for hugo_casillas; flag any inbound since last_seen_ts. Steve-equivalent for Hugo: fiancée writing directly = STRONGEST signal — escalate.

Fire today's plan day for hugo_casillas (workflow: hugo-casillas-seven-day). Skip on response. Draft in Andre voice. Day 1 = email, Day 4 = SMS, Day 6 = email, all conditional on no inbound except Day 1.

Mirror Andre's lowercase peer voice (people/andre_raw.json handling.voice_adjustments). Reference Highland Orchard, the picanha/bacon-wrapped chicken/cauliflower steak menu, and the fiancée's vegetarian anchor. No sales heat, no 'circling back', no template smell.
If quote expires within 7d (May 1) or tasting within 48h (May 17), append to Andre's today.html. Day-of: surface watch-fors — competing-quote pushback, fiancée engagement, Highland Orchard logistics.
